name: UNIDO Constitution 1979 (UN Industrial Development Organization)
summary: The United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UNIDO-treaty framework adopted by the Vienna Conference — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-inclusive-and-sustainable-industrial-development ISID framework + only UN specialized agency operating on industrial-development framework (UNIDO Constitution adopted 8 April 1979 in Vienna Austria + effective 21 June 1985 + UNIDO General Assembly subsidiary body predecessor founded 1966 by UNGA Resolution 2152 XXI + UN specialized agency from 21 June 1985 framework — formal foundational UNIDO treaty framework establishing comprehensive UNIDO organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-inclusive-and-sustainable-industrial-development ISID framework + only UN specialized agency operating on industrial-development framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal SDG 9 + SDG 12 industrial-development SDGs framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Africa Industrialization Day 20 November framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Industrial Development Report annual framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Lima Declaration 2013 ISID framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Abu Dhabi Declaration 2019 + UNIDO General Conference framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Gerd Müller UNIDO Director General 2021-2025+ framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-UNIDO-funding-cuts 2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal US-withdrawn-1996 + UK-withdrawn-2012 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal US-funded-bilaterally-via-Industry-Department framework). The UNIDO Constitution is binding upon 172 UNIDO member states as of 2026 — substantial coverage framework with notable non-members United States withdrew 1996 + United Kingdom withdrew 2012 + Canada withdrew 1993 + Australia withdrew 1997 + New Zealand withdrew 2013 + France withdrew 2014 framework. The Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UNIDO inclusive-and-sustainable-industrial-development framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-industrial-displacement-of-families framework. The UNIDO General Conference + UNIDO Industrial Development Board IDB + UNIDO Director General + UNIDO Secretariat are the formal UNIDO bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UNIDO Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: UNIDO Constitution
statutory_framework.relevance: UNIDO Constitution adopted 8 April 1979 in Vienna Austria + effective 21 June 1985 — formal foundational UNIDO treaty framework establishing comprehensive UNIDO organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Lima Declaration on Inclusive and Sustainable Industrial Development 2013
statutory_framework.title: Lima Declaration on ISID
statutory_framework.relevance: Lima Declaration on Inclusive and Sustainable Industrial Development adopted 3 December 2013 at UNIDO 15th General Conference Lima Peru — formal foundational ISID framework.

statutory_framework.title: Abu Dhabi Declaration
statutory_framework.relevance: Abu Dhabi Declaration adopted November 2019 at UNIDO 18th General Conference Abu Dhabi UAE — formal foundational Abu Dhabi Declaration framework.

apex_courts.name: UNIDO General Conference
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UNIDO.

apex_courts.name: UNIDO Industrial Development Board (IDB)
apex_courts.role: Formal executive body for UNIDO composed of 53 members.

apex_courts.name: UNIDO Director General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UNIDO — Gerd Müller Germany UNIDO Director General 2021-2025+ framework.

anonymisation_convention: UNIDO-related communications operate via state-state framework via UNIDO General Conference + IDB; individual communications not formally accepted under UNIDO framework.

key_developments.title: UNIDO established as UNGA subsidiary body
key_developments.description: UNIDO established 17 November 1966 by UN General Assembly Resolution 2152 XXI as subsidiary body — predecessor framework to UN specialized agency UNIDO.

key_developments.title: UNIDO Constitution adopted
key_developments.description: UNIDO Constitution adopted 8 April 1979 in Vienna Austria — formal foundational UNIDO treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: UNIDO Constitution enters force + UN specialized agency
key_developments.description: UNIDO Constitution entered force 21 June 1985 + UNIDO became UN specialized agency 21 June 1985 — formal foundational UNIDO treaty framework + UN specialized agency framework operational.

key_developments.title: Canada withdraws from UNIDO
key_developments.description: Canada withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 1993 — formal first major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: US withdraws from UNIDO
key_developments.description: United States withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 1996 — formal major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: Australia withdraws from UNIDO
key_developments.description: Australia withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 1997 — formal major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: United Kingdom withdraws from UNIDO
key_developments.description: United Kingdom withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 2012 — formal major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: Lima Declaration on ISID + New Zealand withdraws
key_developments.description: Lima Declaration on Inclusive and Sustainable Industrial Development adopted 3 December 2013 at UNIDO 15th General Conference Lima Peru + New Zealand withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 2013 — formal foundational ISID framework + major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: France withdraws from UNIDO
key_developments.description: France withdrew from UNIDO 31 December 2014 — formal major-state UNIDO-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: Abu Dhabi Declaration
key_developments.description: Abu Dhabi Declaration adopted November 2019 at UNIDO 18th General Conference Abu Dhabi UAE — formal foundational Abu Dhabi Declaration framework operational.

key_developments.title: Gerd Müller Germany UNIDO Director General
key_developments.description: Gerd Müller Germany elected UNIDO Director General + took office 1 December 2021 — formal Gerd Müller UNIDO Director General framework operational.

key_developments.title: Trump-administration-UNIDO-funding-cuts + UN80
key_developments.description: Trump-administration-UNIDO-funding-cuts 2025 + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal Trump-cuts + UN80 framework operational.

structural_findings: UNIDO Constitution operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places UNIDO Constitution in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-inclusive-and-sustainable-industrial-development ISID framework + only UN specialized agency operating on industrial-development framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-inclusive-and-sustainable-industrial-development ISID framework + only UN specialized agency operating on industrial-development framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal SDG 9 + SDG 12 industrial-development SDGs framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Africa Industrialization Day 20 November framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Industrial Development Report annual framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Lima Declaration 2013 ISID framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Abu Dhabi Declaration 2019 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Gerd Müller UNIDO Director General 2021-2025+ framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-UNIDO-funding-cuts 2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal US-withdrawn-1996 + UK-withdrawn-2012 + Canada-1993 + Australia-1997 + New-Zealand-2013 + France-2014 multiple-major-state-withdrawals framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal US-funded-bilaterally-via-Industry-Department framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Lima Declaration 2013 ISID framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Lima Declaration ISID framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNIDO multiple-major-state-withdrawals framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 6-major-state-withdrawals framework: US 1996 + UK 2012 + Canada 1993 + Australia 1997 + New Zealand 2013 + France 2014.
172 UNIDO member state ratification framework with major-state-withdrawals is structurally distinctive globally — substantial coverage framework.

1966 UNIDO + 1979 Constitution + 1985 entry into force + UN specialized agency + 1993 Canada + 1996 US + 1997 Australia + 2012 UK + 2013 Lima + New Zealand + 2014 France + 2019 Abu Dhabi + 2021 Gerd Müller + 2025 Trump-cuts + UN80 UNIDO-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UNIDO Constitution + Lima Declaration + Abu Dhabi Declaration + Industrial Development Report + ISID + Africa Industrialization Day formal sextet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-industrial-displacement-of-families framework.
